requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (PS/CISPR 14 adoption; PTA only for radio modules)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（PS/CISPR 14采标；仅无线模块涉及PTA）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（PS/CISPR 14採標；僅無線模組涉及PTA）

summary.en: Pakistan does not operate an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive covering all electrical products. For household refrigerating appliances, electromagnetic compatibility is addressed through any Pakistan Standard that PSQCA has adopted from the IEC/CISPR 14 series (CISPR 14-1 emission and CISPR 14-2 immunity for household appliances), applied where the product is within PSQCA's Conformity Assessment scope; absent a specific mandatory PS adoption, IEC/CISPR 14 is the recognised technical reference. Separately, the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) regulates radio equipment: a plain (non-connected) refrigerator does NOT fall under PTA, but a smart refrigerator with a Wi-Fi or Bluetooth radio module requires PTA type-approval of that radio module before it can be legally imported and sold. There is no single mandatory horizontal EMC mark for ordinary appliances comparable to the EU EMC Directive.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦没有覆盖所有电气产品的欧盟式横向EMC指令。对于家用制冷器具，电磁兼容通过PSQCA从IEC/CISPR 14系列（家用器具的CISPR 14-1发射与CISPR 14-2抗扰度）采用的任何巴基斯坦标准处理，适用于产品处于PSQCA合格评定范围内的情形；若无具体强制性PS采标，则以IEC/CISPR 14为公认技术参考。另外，巴基斯坦电信管理局（PTA）监管无线电设备：普通（非联网）电冰箱不属于PTA管辖，但配备Wi-Fi或蓝牙无线模块的智能电冰箱须在合法进口和销售前取得该无线模块的PTA型号核准。普通器具不存在类似欧盟EMC指令的单一强制性横向EMC标识。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦沒有覆蓋所有電氣產品的歐盟式橫向EMC指令。對於家用製冷器具，電磁相容通過PSQCA從IEC/CISPR 14系列（家用器具的CISPR 14-1發射與CISPR 14-2抗擾度）採用的任何巴基斯坦標準處理，適用於產品處於PSQCA合格評定範圍內的情形；若無具體強制性PS採標，則以IEC/CISPR 14為公認技術參考。另外，巴基斯坦電信管理局（PTA）監管無線電設備：普通（非聯網）電冰箱不屬於PTA管轄，但配備Wi-Fi或藍牙無線模組的智能電冰箱須在合法進口和銷售前取得該無線模組的PTA型號核准。普通器具不存在類似歐盟EMC指令的單一強制性橫向EMC標識。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan Standard adopting CISPR 14-1 (emission) / CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household appliances — where adopted by PSQCA; otherwise IEC/CISPR 14 as recognised technical reference
Pakistan Telecommunication (Re-organisation) Act, 1996 — PTA mandate over radio equipment
PTA Type Approval — required only for refrigerators incorporating a Wi-Fi / Bluetooth or other radio module

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are mandatory and centrally enforced: GB 4343.1-2018 (emission; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonic current emissions; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) where applicable. EMC is part of the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering household appliances, administered by SAMR/CNCA, so a Chinese refrigerator already carries CCC EMC test data based on the CISPR 14 family. This Chinese EMC test evidence is technically aligned with the IEC/CISPR 14 basis that Pakistan references, but is generated under the CCC scheme and is not automatically accepted by PSQCA without that authority's acceptance process; it also does not address PTA radio type-approval for connected models.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求为强制性并集中执行：GB 4343.1-2018（发射；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；等同CISPR 14-2:2015），适用时配合GB 17625.1-2022（谐波电流发射；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。电磁兼容属于覆盖家用器具的中国强制认证（CCC）内容，由SAMR/CNCA管理，因此中国电冰箱已具备基于CISPR 14系列的CCC电磁兼容检测数据。该中国电磁兼容检测证据在技术上与巴基斯坦参照的IEC/CISPR 14基础对齐，但系在CCC制度下生成，未经PSQCA认可程序不被自动接受；亦不涉及联网型号的PTA无线电型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求為強制性並集中執行：GB 4343.1-2018（發射；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；等同CISPR 14-2:2015），適用時配合GB 17625.1-2022（諧波電流發射；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。電磁相容屬於覆蓋家用器具的中國強制認證（CCC）內容，由SAMR/CNCA管理，因此中國電冰箱已具備基於CISPR 14系列的CCC電磁相容檢測數據。該中國電磁相容檢測證據在技術上與巴基斯坦參照的IEC/CISPR 14基礎對齊，但係在CCC制度下生成，未經PSQCA認可程序不被自動接受；亦不涉及聯網型號的PTA無線電型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods for household appliances (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Immunity, product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Pakistan lacks an EU-style horizontal EMC regime, so the exporter's main EMC obligations are narrower than for the EU, but two points apply: (1) Standards/marking route — where PSQCA's adopted PS standard for household-appliance EMC (CISPR 14 basis) applies and the product is on the Conformity Assessment list, EMC conformity is demonstrated through PSQCA's process; the exporter should confirm with PSQCA whether existing CISPR 14-based test reports (including IECEE CB / ILAC MRA reports) are accepted, since China's GB 4343.1 CCC data, though technically aligned, is not automatically recognised. (2) Connected models — a smart/IoT refrigerator with a Wi-Fi or Bluetooth radio requires PTA type-approval of the radio module; the manufacturer must supply the module's regulatory details (e.g., supplier declaration, radio test reports) to obtain PTA approval before import. For a standard non-connected refrigerator, there is no separate PTA EMC mark to obtain.
gap.zh: 巴基斯坦缺乏欧盟式横向EMC制度，因此出口商的电磁兼容义务范围窄于欧盟，但有两点适用：（1）标准/标识路径——若PSQCA采用的家用器具电磁兼容PS标准（CISPR 14基础）适用且产品列入合格评定清单，则电磁兼容合格通过PSQCA流程证明；出口商应向PSQCA确认现有基于CISPR 14的检测报告（含IECEE CB / ILAC MRA报告）是否被接受，因为中国GB 4343.1 CCC数据虽技术对齐但不被自动认可。（2）联网型号——配备Wi-Fi或蓝牙无线电的智能/物联网电冰箱须取得无线模块的PTA型号核准；制造商须提供模块监管资料（如供应商声明、无线电检测报告）以在进口前获得PTA核准。对于标准非联网电冰箱，无需另行取得PTA电磁兼容标识。
gap.zht: 巴基斯坦缺乏歐盟式橫向EMC制度，因此出口商的電磁相容義務範圍窄於歐盟，但有兩點適用：（1）標準/標識路徑——若PSQCA採用的家用器具電磁相容PS標準（CISPR 14基礎）適用且產品列入合格評定清單，則電磁相容合格通過PSQCA流程證明；出口商應向PSQCA確認現有基於CISPR 14的檢測報告（含IECEE CB / ILAC MRA報告）是否被接受，因為中國GB 4343.1 CCC數據雖技術對齊但不被自動認可。（2）聯網型號——配備Wi-Fi或藍牙無線電的智能/物聯網電冰箱須取得無線模組的PTA型號核准；製造商須提供模組監管資料（如供應商聲明、無線電檢測報告）以在進口前獲得PTA核准。對於標準非聯網電冰箱，無需另行取得PTA電磁相容標識。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no horizontal EMC mark for ordinary refrigerators; CISPR 14-based EMC applies via PSQCA where the product is on the Conformity Assessment list; PTA radio type-approval is mandatory only for connected (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1-2018 EMC is part of CCC certification for household appliances; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive for ordinary refrigerators. EMC for household appliances is addressed via PSQCA-adopted CISPR 14-based standards where the product is on the Conformity Assessment list; Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC EMC data is technically aligned but not automatically accepted — confirm test-report acceptance with PSQCA. PTA type-approval is required only when the refrigerator contains a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth radio module.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦对普通电冰箱没有欧盟式横向EMC指令。家用器具电磁兼容在产品列入合格评定清单时通过PSQCA采用的基于CISPR 14的标准处理；中国GB 4343.1 CCC电磁兼容数据技术对齐但不被自动接受——请向PSQCA确认检测报告接受度。仅当电冰箱含Wi-Fi/蓝牙无线模块时才需取得PTA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦對普通電冰箱沒有歐盟式橫向EMC指令。家用器具電磁相容在產品列入合格評定清單時通過PSQCA採用的基於CISPR 14的標準處理；中國GB 4343.1 CCC電磁相容數據技術對齊但不被自動接受——請向PSQCA確認檢測報告接受度。僅當電冰箱含Wi-Fi/藍牙無線模組時才需取得PTA型號核准。
